history.reason: Phase A+B artifacts complete: spec.md, design.md, data-schema.json, c4.json, sequence.json, idef0.json, grafcet.json all drafted; cause-family enum + log entry schema + recovery dispatch all defined; empty-turn classifier traceability A1-A6 wired through c4.json moduleRef and grafcet.json ModuleRef

Phase planned artifacts complete: tasks.md (4 phases, 38 tasks with IDEF0-numbered IDs), handoff.md (Execution Contract / 13 Required Reads / 10 Stop Gates / Execution-Ready Checklist / Validation Evidence template), test-vectors.json (12 vectors covering A1-A7), errors.md (6 catalogued breadcrumbs CET-001..006, all non-throwing), observability.md (1 bus channel + 1 JSONL log + 7 derived metrics + recommended alerts/dashboards)
